headline: Scapes and trellis due today — hot dry weekend ahead
weather_notes: Water potato_bags before Saturday — freshly planted Yukon Gold (day 3) in bags dry out twice as fast as raised beds during 83-88°F weekend with zero rain through Memorial Day.
Water c2-c4 peas before Sunday — pods at fill-stage lose quality under heat stress without consistent soil moisture; 87-88°F Sunday-Monday with zero rain forecast.

surfaced_tasks.title: Snap scapes on w3 Italian Red garlic
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due today at peak scape window — every day delayed redirects energy away from bulb development ahead of the July harvest.

surfaced_tasks.title: Install trellis in c1 bean bed
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due today — Good Mother Stollard pole beans need vertical support now before the warm weekend accelerates vine growth and tangling.
